task_completion.description: Configure the existing DirectionalLight node with the specified parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Webots scene tree or a text editor showing the DirectionalLight properties being modified to: direction '0.3 -1 -0.5', intensity '0.4', color '1 0.95 0.85', and castShadows 'TRUE'.

task_completion.description: Configure the existing Background node's luminosity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Background node selected in the Webots scene tree or text editor, with its 'luminosity' field explicitly set to '1.2'.

task_completion.description: Add and configure the first PointLight node.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new PointLight node added to the scene. Its properties should be visible: location '[-2 4 0]', intensity '0.6', color '0.95 0.95 1.0', and attenuation '0 0 1'.

task_completion.description: Add and configure the second PointLight node.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a second new PointLight node added to the scene. Its properties should be visible: location '[2 4 0]', intensity '0.6', color '0.95 0.95 1.0', and attenuation '0 0 1'.

task_completion.description: Save the modified world to the Desktop as warehouse_lighting.wbt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save World As' dialog in Webots saving to '/home/ga/Desktop/warehouse_lighting.wbt', the Webots title bar updating to this path, or terminal/file explorer evidence showing the file successfully created on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with the Webots GUI or a text editor to modify the world.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Webots interface (scene tree/field editor) or manually editing the .wbt file in a text editor, rather than just running a single bash command to overwrite the file with a pre-computed string.

integrity.description: Agent demonstrates step-by-step configuration of the lighting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps of changing values (e.g., typing in the intensity, adding nodes one by one) rather than the final state appearing instantly without prior interaction.

integrity.description: The file was actually saved to the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the save action explicitly targets the Desktop directory, and the agent doesn't just close the program without saving or save it to a default temporary folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file must be exactly '/home/ga/Desktop/warehouse_lighting.wbt'. The DirectionalLight must have an intensity of 0.4. The Background node must have a luminosity of 1.2. There must be exactly 2 new PointLight nodes added, each with an intensity of 0.6 and a minimum height (Y-coordinate) of 3.0 (ideally 4.0 as per the instructions).
